TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pibutingan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Pibutingan. 370 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,056 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 21% niqan 225 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 79% niqan 831 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 48%, Sakizaya 10%, Bunun 2%, Tayal 1%, Truku 1%, Puyuma 1%, ni rahuq na o 3%.
S.PHON: = pibutiŋan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sinʦuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ pibutiŋan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, saki*aja **%, bunun *%, tajal *%, tɾuku *%, pujuma *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = Pibutingan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Pibutingan. 370 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,056 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 21% niqan 225 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 79% niqan 831 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 48%, Sakizaya 10%, Bunun 2%, Tayal 1%, Truku 1%, Puyuma 1%, ni rahuq na o 3%.
S.PHON: = pibutiŋan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sinʦuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ pibutiŋan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, saki*aja **%, bunun *%, tajal *%, tɾuku *%, pujuma *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
